summary: Hydrated preflight shows the only open actionable seed, #75380, is security-sensitive because it involves raw provider/cache diagnostic payloads, secret-bearing prompt/system content at rest, and the issue is already labeled for security review. The hydrated overlapping PR #76407 is also security-sensitive and has a security-boundary merge-risk label plus failing real-behavior-proof checks, so both open refs are routed to central OpenClaw security handling. Closed linked refs are retained only as historical context and no close, merge, label, fix, or PR-opening action is planned.
